title: TNAU Admission 2026-27 Overview

detail.title: TNAU Admission 2026-27 Overview
detail.short_info: TNAU Admission 2026 is open for UG B.Sc (Hons.) and Diploma programmes. Apply online till 8 June 2026. Check eligibility, important dates, fees and direct application link for Agriculture, Horticulture & Agricultural Engineering courses.

content.text: TNAU Admission 2026 (Tamil Nadu Agricultural University) for Undergraduate and Diploma programmes is now open. Online applications have started and the last date to apply is 8 June 2026.

Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU) Admission 2026-27 has officially begun for B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture, Horticulture, Agricultural Engineering and Diploma programmes in Agriculture, Horticulture and Agricultural Engineering. Students can apply online through the single window portal till 8 June 2026.

Admissions are purely merit-based on Class 12th marks. TNAU, along with its affiliated colleges and Annamalai University Faculty of Agriculture, offers excellent opportunities in agricultural education with strong focus on practical training, research and entrepreneurship. This is the best time for 10+2 Science stream students to secure admission in one of India’s premier agricultural universities. Apply early and keep all documents ready. (96 words)

rows: B.Sc (Hons.) Agriculture, Horticulture, Agricultural Engineering & Diploma Programmes
Pass in HSC (10+2) with Physics, Chemistry, Biology (Academic or Vocational Stream with Agriculture subjects)
HSC with Mathematics, Physics & Chemistry (Vocational not eligible)
Pass in 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics as per ICAR norms

content.text: Age Limit: Should not have completed 21 years as on 01.07.2026 (No upper age limit for SC/ST)

sections.heading: How to Apply for TNAU Admission 2026 (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official admission portal: https://tnau.ucanapply.com
Complete New Registration with valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form with personal, academic and reservation details.
Upload scanned copies of required documents.
Pay the application fee online.
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.
HSC (+2) Mark Sheet & Certificate
Transfer Certificate & Conduct Certificate
Community & Nativity Certificate (for Tamil Nadu candidates)
Aadhaar Card
Passport size photograph & signature
Physical Fitness Certificate (at the time of admission)
Undergraduate: B.Sc. (Hons.) Agriculture, B.Sc. (Hons.) Horticulture, B.Tech Agricultural Engineering etc.
Diploma: 2-year Diploma in Agriculture, Horticulture and Agricultural Engineering (offered in Constituent, Government and Private affiliated institutes)
